workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml

This is a PURE FUNCTION workflow - it reads Story files and PRD register files, extracts BMAD-ANNO callouts, and outputs structured results. It does NOT modify any files. Three modes: pending-summary (count only), interactive (list for processing), batch-silent (dump to annotations dir).

step.goal: Load sprint status and identify active stories
step.action: Read {sprint_status} to find stories in active states: ready-for-dev, in-progress, review
If sprint_status does not exist, scan all .md files in {story_dir} instead
Also scan {prd_register}/PRD14-S*.md files for PRD-section annotations
Build list of files to scan

step.goal: Parse BMAD-ANNO callouts from each file
step.action: For each file in the scan list:
1. Extract the "## User Feedback & Changes" section (or "## 用户批注区" for PRD register files)
3. Parse the YAML body of each callout (strip leading "> " prefix from each line)
4. Extract fields: scope, target, intent, action, reason, changes, bug_id, target_decision
5. Check if annotation ID has already been processed (look for "processed" marker or check annotations_dir)
6. Collect unprocessed annotations into results list
- Each line in the callout body starts with "> " which must be stripped
- The first line after [!BMAD-ANNO] is the annotation ID
- Remaining lines are YAML key-value pairs
- Multi-line values use YAML block scalar (| or >)

check.action: Output a one-line summary: count of unprocessed annotations grouped by intent
Format: "N unprocessed annotations: X minor / Y moderate / Z major"
If count is 0, output empty string (for SessionStart hook: zero injection)
Display each unprocessed annotation with full details:
Ask user which annotations to process, or "all" to process everything
Selected annotations are passed to the apply-feedback workflow
Write each unprocessed annotation as a YAML file to {annotations_dir}/
Include: source_file, annotation_id, intent, action, reason, changes, scan_timestamp
Failed annotations go to {annotations_dir}/_failed/ with error details
No stdout output (silent mode for Stop hook)
